general.name: Ahmed Hany
general.description: Software Engineer focused on crafting high-performance mobile applications through clean architecture, modern engineering practices, and user-centered design.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: I transform ideas into digital experiences by analyzing challenges, designing intuitive solutions, writing clean and maintainable code, and solving real-world problems that drive meaningful results.

platform_architecture.title: Platform & scalable architecture
platform_architecture.description: Building scalable Flutter applications with maintainable codebases, clean boundaries, and architectural patterns designed for long-term growth, team collaboration, and product evolution.

state_management.title: State & presentation depth
state_management.description: Delivering predictable application state and polished user experiences through modern state management approaches, reusable UI patterns, and performance-focused presentation layers.

apis_sync.title: APIs, sync & real-time
apis_sync.description: Creating resilient communication layers between mobile applications and backend services with real-time updates, offline support, caching strategies, and reliable synchronization.

data_security.title: Persistence, security & data
data_security.description: Implementing secure data storage, local persistence, encryption, and authentication strategies that ensure reliability, privacy, and seamless user experiences.

performance_reliability.title: Native, performance & reliability
performance_reliability.description: Optimizing applications for speed, stability, and production readiness with native integrations, performance monitoring, automated testing, and debugging workflows.

mobile_devops.title: Delivery & mobile DevOps
mobile_devops.description: Automating build, testing, and deployment pipelines to accelerate releases, improve reliability, and maintain efficient delivery processes across development teams.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: A timeline of my professional growth in software engineering, building scalable mobile applications, delivering production-ready solutions, and creating impactful digital experiences.

adwar_logistics.work_description: Developing a cross-platform logistics application focused on driver operations, shipment management, pickups, and deliveries. Implementing barcode scanning, proof of delivery, route tracking, real-time updates, offline support, and scalable logistics workflows.

meem_market.work_description: Developing internal and business-critical retail applications including HR management, stock tracking, price checking, and POS systems while delivering scalable and high-performance cross-platform solutions.

tharad_tech.work_description: Contributed to multiple production Flutter applications by implementing cross-platform features, API integrations, responsive interfaces, performance improvements, and bug fixes using modern development practices.

depi.work_description: Completed an intensive training program focused on building production-ready Flutter applications using clean architecture, state management, Firebase, API integration, and Agile development practices.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Showcasing innovative mobile applications, scalable architectures, and high-quality digital products crafted to solve real-world challenges and create meaningful user value.

tarh.title: Tarh
tarh.about: A modern bilingual real estate marketplace facilitating property buying, renting, and advertising with geographical mapping and integrated chats.
tarh.description: Tarh is your go-to app for real estate marketing, helping you buy, sell, or rent properties across a wide range of listings. Whether you're looking for a cozy apartment, a luxury villa, or a relaxing chalet, Tarh connects you with the right buyers or tenants.
tarh.feature1: Browse detailed listings with categorization, photo galleries, and filtering options
tarh.feature2: A structured, multi-step property creation wizard with attributes and file attachments
tarh.feature3: Google Maps interactive search to browse local property listings with custom map pins
tarh.feature4: Direct in-app messaging system connecting prospective clients with property advertisers
tarh.feature5: Multiple subscription plan tiers for advertisers with online credit card/webview payments
tarh.feature6: Bilingual layout (Arabic/English) with RTL support, custom role selection, and FCM notifications

shaghel.title: Shaghel
shaghel.about: An on-demand home maintenance marketplace connecting clients with top-rated technicians.
shaghel.description: Shaghel is a cross-platform home maintenance client built with Flutter. Featuring a dual-role flow (Client & Technician), clients can request 9+ service categories including AC repair, cleaning, plumbing, carpentry, and electrical work. Requests support visual uploads and voice note recording. Technicians can manage their availability, view accumulated reward points, and track emergency or scheduled orders. A real-time Socket.io server facilitates instant communication.
shaghel.feature1: Dual-Role Architecture: Separate workflows and custom interfaces designed specifically for Clients and Service Providers.
shaghel.feature2: Multimedia Requests: Allows clients to record voice complaints, upload photos, schedule appointments, and select payment types.
shaghel.feature3: Proximity-Based Sorting: Uses Google Maps and GPS Geolocation to search and rank technicians by distance and user rating.
shaghel.feature4: Real-Time Bidirectional Chat: Instant messaging system built on Socket.io for direct chat coordination and image sharing.
shaghel.feature5: Technician Console: Integrated online/offline toggle, wallet points ledger, and paginated scroll lists for orders.
shaghel.feature6: FCM & Local Notifications: Double-layered alert infrastructure keeping both roles updated on chats, requests, and order updates.

rahma.title: Rahma Healthcare
rahma.about: Rahma Healthcare is a trusted digital healthcare platform authorized by the Saudi Ministry of Health, offering voice and video consultations.
rahma.description: A comprehensive digital platform connecting users with accredited medical, psychological, and social specialists. It features in-app wallet management, secure card payments, full profile setups supporting family members, Zoom telehealth integrations, and digital medical reports.
rahma.feature1: Audio & Video Consultations: Secure, high-quality audio and video telehealth calls integrated via Zoom.
rahma.feature2: In-App Financial Wallet: Secure balance recharge, consultation bookings, and practitioner withdrawal requests.
rahma.feature3: Family Profiles Support: Ability to register family members under a single account to coordinate their care.
rahma.feature4: Smart Provider Filtering: Detailed search by specialization, fees, and genuine patient ratings.
rahma.feature5: Digital Medical Reports: Seamless retrieval of virtual prescriptions, sessions history, and digital reports.
rahma.feature6: Secure Payment Gateways: Seamless checkout support via Visa, Mada, and Apple Pay.

qutouf_al_daad.title: Qutouf Al Daad
qutouf_al_daad.about: An advanced educational platform designed to make Arabic language learning interactive, engaging, and accessible for students, teachers, and parents.
qutouf_al_daad.description: Qutouf Al Daad is a comprehensive Arabic learning platform built with Flutter and Clean Architecture. The application provides a complete educational ecosystem where students can access lessons, assignments, and exams, teachers can create and manage educational content, and parents can monitor academic performance. The platform supports real-time updates, push notifications, bilingual localization, performance analytics, AI-powered assistance, and a modern user experience across Android and iOS.
qutouf_al_daad.feature1: Interactive lessons with videos, documents, and educational resources
qutouf_al_daad.feature2: Online examinations with automatic grading and performance tracking
qutouf_al_daad.feature3: Dedicated dashboards for students, teachers, and parents
qutouf_al_daad.feature4: Real-time notifications and synchronization using Firebase
qutouf_al_daad.feature5: AI-powered assistant for helping students during learning
qutouf_al_daad.feature6: Bilingual support with Arabic and English localization

future_x.title: Future X
future_x.about: Future X is an innovative mobile application designed as a digital launchpad to help you understand yourself, discover your personality traits, and identify your career interests through scientific, instant assessments.
future_x.description: Future X empowers users to discover their strengths and professional styles in a smart and streamlined way. It features a 100-question behavioral test designed by specialized scholars, generating immediate leadership trait profiles (Strategic, Loving, Analytical, or Inspirational). The app offers detailed educational guidance, career path suggestions, historical test records, custom push notifications, and payment integration for booking advanced consultations and unlocking deeper analytical reviews.
future_x.feature2: Instant Trait Profiling & Leadership Percentage Metrics
future_x.feature4: Integrated Paid Report Purchases & Online Checkout Webview
future_x.feature5: Personal History Records & Dashboard to Track Assessments
future_x.feature6: Direct Expert & Specialist Consultation Booking System

qarah.title: Qarah
qarah.about: Qarah is a digital marketplace application that connects customers needing water delivery services with local distributors, streamlining the bidding and logistics process.
qarah.description: Qarah simplifies local water supply by enabling users to submit delivery requests and receive custom quotes from nearby distributors. It supports full user cycle roles (Client & Distributor) with permission-based access, map-integrated address configurations, real-time bid comparison/selection, secure multi-channel payments, order fulfillment confirmation with review systems, and a dedicated digital wallet to manage earnings and withdrawal requests.
qarah.feature2: Interactive Map Pickers for Custom Delivery Destinations
qarah.feature3: Competitive Distributor Bidding & Price Quote Engine
qarah.feature5: Transaction Logs, History & Order Tracking Dashboards
qarah.feature6: Digital Wallet System & Bank Transfer Withdrawals

tutorials.subtitle: Sharing practical tutorials, development guides, and technical insights drawn from real-world experience to help developers build scalable, maintainable, and high-quality applications.

contact_section.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, exciting projects, and meaningful collaborations. Whether you have an idea, a question, or simply want to connect, feel free to reach out, and let's build something great together.
